title: Doctor Doom Mod
description: A mod/datapack that adds Doctor Doom's Abilities and Equipment into the game.
body:
# Doctor Doom Mod
A Mod/Data & Resource Pack that adds Doctor Doom's Armor, Equipment, and Abilities.

![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32e694d1dddd12fd9fb84f312eafc690e2167d7c.png)

# Description
This is a Datapack and Resource Pack Combo which has been compiled into a mod if you prefer. It adds Doctor Doom's Armor, Doctor Doom's Gauntlet which can have an ability attached to it.

# Notes:
- At the time of writing this multiplayer is currently untested
- There are hidden tributes to the illest super-villain and rapper MF DOOM

# Known Issues:
(Patched as of version 1.02+) ~~When playing Multiplayer/On Server a Client and Server Disconnect will happen whenever moving up or down while flying with Doom Armor. This is because the vertical flight controls use the Player Motion Datapack which while applying motion with it it teleports the player quite a lot which while on a server or on multiplayer will cause a client/server disconnect making you a sort of a ghost while your player is stuck in place.
The fix would be to move away from player motion as it is a bug in Minecraft's code, which is what I am currently working on.~~
